title: sida hirsuta
intro: Sida hirsuta, also known as hairy sida or hairy mallow, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. The medicinal properties of Sida hirsuta include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and glycosides in its leaves. The health benefits of using Sida hirsuta include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Sida hirsuta can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application to treat various health conditions.
